charter.mission: Run a bounded no-leak model-zoo search over cheap tree/ranking variants on the lawful 10-row CPO layer and check whether any variant can beat the current neutral selective baseline without materially worse drawdown.
in_scope: explicit comparison against aggressive, neutral, and oracle tracks
success_criteria: the search emits explicit portfolio traces
the report states whether any variant beats neutral without materially worse drawdown

interpretation: V1.12BK is a bounded model-zoo search, not a deployment step.
It exists to test whether cheaper tree/ranker variants can beat the current neutral selective baseline without opening the model search too widely.
